scripts.migrate:up: DATABASE_URL=$(node scripts/db-url.js) npx node-pg-migrate up -m migrations --database-url-var DATABASE_URL
scripts.migrate:down: DATABASE_URL=$(node scripts/db-url.js) npx node-pg-migrate down -m migrations --database-url-var DATABASE_URL
scripts.migrate:status: DATABASE_URL=$(node scripts/db-url.js) npx node-pg-migrate status -m migrations --database-url-var DATABASE_URL
